title: Discoverable APIs with HATEOAS & JSON-LD
description: Design discoverable APIs by applying HATEOAS principles using hypermedia links. Utilize JSON-LD to enhance API semantic meaning and enable navigational state transitions. Reduce client-server coupling through the implementation of hypermedia-driven interfaces.
objectives: Design discoverable APIs by applying HATEOAS principles using hypermedia links.
Utilize JSON-LD to enhance API semantic meaning and enable navigational state transitions.
Reduce client-server coupling through the implementation of hypermedia-driven interfaces.
